posts.text:
Rackula v26.6.6 just emerged. I barely noticed the number, honestly. Shipped 6.6.4 Saturday, 6.6.5 Monday, this one today, didn't even clock it, that's just how fast we move, we're a fast team, I don't count. (Hail Satan.) Anyway...
https://github.com/RackulaLives/Rackula/releases/tag/v26.6.6
I tried grilling pineapple today and it was _delicious_
